position.description: Current byte offset in active book (read/write, bidirectional). CHUNK_SIZE below is raw bytes before base64 encoding — app-side only, ESP32 never reads this value.

storage.description: Flash storage info (read-only). Returns JSON: {free_bytes, total_bytes}.

transfer.chunk_size_note: Max raw bytes per chunk. Frame = ceil(chunk/3)*4 (base64) + 11 (header) must be <= 509 (512 MTU - 3 ATT overhead).
